---
title: "Openness and OSM compatibility of cantonal geodata"
author:
  - name: Ralph Straumann
    url: https://ralphstraumann.ch
date: "2026-06-08 18:50"
image: "tim-mossholder-XU84U7xhQ_4-unsplash.jpg"
description: 'Simon Poole has compiled an overview of Swiss cantonal #opendata by #licence type: which "access authorisation level A" datasets are truly #open and which are compatible with #OpenStreetMap. Separately, a weekly-updated monitor tracks the openness and availability of all cantonal geodata on geodienste.ch.'
---

Simon Poole has [compiled a brief overview][post] of which cantonal geodata of 
"access authorisation level"[^term] "A" can be considered open and/or OSM compatible. 
Simon's [disclaimer][post]: 

> In the following I’m using "open" in a hand wavy, “close enough” fashion (...), 
and not applying the strict definition as per the open defin[i]tion.

Simon's overview does not include cadastral surveying[^terms] data, as 
these are often subject to special rules and restrictions. By the way, some special terminology 
in Simon's [post][post] that may not be obvious to everybody:

- IANAL: I am not a lawyer
- ToU / tou: Terms of Use

Out of 26 cantons, Simon classifies the "A" level data of 12 as OSM[^osm] compatible, 9 as
not OSM compatible, and 5 as unclear:

- OSM compatible: AI, BS, FR, GL, NE, NW, SH, SO, SG, TG, UR, ZH
- Not OSM compatible: AG, BL, BE, JU, LU, OW, TI, VD, VS
- Unclear: AR, GE, GR, SZ, ZG

Different, but somewhat related: [This page][monitor][^transp] analyses the openness and general availability of all cantonal geodata available through [geodienste.ch](https://geodienste.ch), the portal by [KGK-CGC](https://www.kgk-cgc.ch/)[^kgk-cgc] that provides access to both geospatial data and services. The monitor is updated weekly on Monday.

[post]: https://www.openstreetmap.org/user/SimonPoole/diary/408664

[^term]: In German: [Zugangsberechtigungsstufe](https://www.fedlex.admin.ch/eli/cc/2008/389/de#art_21), in French: [Niveau d’autorisation d’accès](https://www.fedlex.admin.ch/eli/cc/2008/389/fr#art_21).
 
[^terms]: In German: Amtliche Vermessung (AV), in French: Mensuration Officielle (MO).

[monitor]: https://ralphstraumann.ch/monitoring-geodienste-ch/

[^osm]: [OpenStreetMap](https://www.openstreetmap.org/), a collaborative, open-licensed map of the world.

[^transp]: Transparency note: I have built and maintain the [geodienste.ch monitor][monitor].

[^kgk-cgc]: The Conference of the Cantonal Geoinformation and Cadastral Offices in Switzerland.
